title: psephellus bellus
intro: Psephellus bellus, also known as the beautiful scabious, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. Psephellus bellus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, salves, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
